description: A pair of open-toed multicolored sandals with low-top styling and has a buckle closureSynthetic upper with straps across the forefoot and the midfoot with buckle closures, has an ankle loop that is secured with an adjustable buckle closureSmooth footbed with branding on the heelTPU outsole with branding, has a platform heel on the forefoot and a slim heel that has a plastic heel cap on the back
